title: lepidium desvauxii
intro: Lepidium desvauxii, also known as cressa or bladderpod, is a species of flowering plant in the family Brassicaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly as a diuretic and to treat urinary tract infections. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation and relieving symptoms of irritable bowel syndrome. Lepidium desvauxii can be prepared as a decoction or infusion, and is also used in herbal supplements, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
